AddClass.description:
Use this tool to assign a class to a node. This is essentially AddTriple with relation being rdf:type
and object being an allowed entity type. Note that it does not matter whether the subject node already
exists (participates in any triples), the class assignment is anyway valid. Make sure that all nodes
have classes assigned to them!

subject.description: A node in the data graph to which you want to assign a class.
subject.title: Subject

type.description: A type (out of the list of allowed entity types) that you want to assign to the subject node.
type.title: Type

AddClass.title: AddClass

RemoveClass.description:
Use this tool to remove a class assigned to a node. This is essentially RemoveTriple with relation
being rdf:type and object being an allowed entity type. Make sure that the subject node actually
has that class assigned to it which you want to remove! And also make sure that all nodes have
classes assigned to them!

subject.description: A node in the data graph which class you want to remove.
subject.title: Subject

type.description: A type (out of the allowed entity types) that is assigned to the subject and should be removed
type.title: Type

RemoveClass.title: RemoveClass

AddTriple.description:
Use this tool to add a triple to the data graph. Make sure the relation comes from the list of allowed relations
for this ontology.

subject.description: A subject node of the triple.
subject.title: Subject

relation.description: A relation (out of the allowed relations) defined between the subject and object of this triple
relation.title: Relation

object.description: An object node of the triple.
object.title: Object

AddTriple.title: AddTriple

RemoveTriple.description: Use this tool to remove a triple from the data graph. Make sure the triple that you are about to remove actually exists.

subject.description: An existing subject node of the triple to be removed.
subject.title: Subject

relation.description: A relation (out of the allowed relations) defined between the subject and object of the triple to be removed
relation.title: Relation

object.description: An existing object node of the triple to be removed
object.title: Object

RemoveTriple.title: RemoveTriple

ValidateShacl.description:
Use this tool to validate that the current data graph adheres to the ontology.
The validation is performed through SHACL, the shapes are pre-generated.
The tool does not have any input arguments, the data graph is passed internally.
ValidateShacl.title: ValidateShacl

Finish.description: Use this tool to finish the work. No input arguments required.
Finish.title: Finish
